---
about:  
  template: trestles
  image: img/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: "{{< fa brands github size=huge >}}"
      href: https://github.com/hrlai
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar size=huge >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=g9SWxxcAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate
    - text: "{{< fa brands researchgate size=huge >}}"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Hao_Ran_Lai
    - text: "{{< fa brands linkedin size=huge >}}"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/haoranlai/
    - text: "{{< fa brands orcid size=huge >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6871-0146
    - text: "{{< fa envelope size=huge >}}"
      href: mailto:hrlai.ecology@gmail.com
  
toc: false
---

## Quantitative and Functional Ecology

Apa khabar! I'm Lai Hao Ran (賴浩然) and a plant community ecologist. My research aims to understand and generalise the dynamics of forest biodiversity through functional traits, statistical rigour, and long-term monitoring. 
<!-- I am now broadening my research into multitrophic interactions and ecological networks, leveraging advanced quantitative and trait-based methods developed in my field and applying them to the study of ecological networks. -->
My career goal is to build capacity and foster a more innovative research community in Malaysia and tropical Asia.

Please feel free to reach out for research collaboration, forest fieldwork, guest teaching, and project (co)supervision.

### Current position
Ecologist / Data scientist, South East Asia Rainforest Research Partnership (SEARRP), Malaysia (joint appointment with Imperial College London, UK)
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa award >}} 2025 ForestGEO Research Award</span>

### Past positions
2019--2025 | Post-doctoral fellow, School of Biological Sciences, University of Canterbury, New Zealand
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa award >}} Marsden Fast Start Grant</span>

2019 | Visiting Research Fellow, Centre for Urban Greenery and Ecology, National Parks Board, Singapore
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa award >}} CUGE Visiting Research Fellowship</span>

2015--2018 | Teaching assistant, National University of Singapore, Singapore 
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa medal >}} 2018 Teaching Assistant Award</span>
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa medal >}} 2017 Teaching Assistant Award</span>

### Education
2015--2018 | PhD, Department of Biological Sciences, National University of Singapore, Singapore 
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa medal >}} International Society for Plant Molecular Biology Medal for most outstanding thesis</span>

2009--2012 | BSc (Hons), School of Biological Sciences, The University of Queensland, Australia 
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa medal >}} University Medal</span>
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa medal >}} D.A. Herbert Prize in Botany</span>
<span class="award-badge">{{< fa medal >}} F.A. Perkins Prize in Entomology</span>
